Meaning.En: A senior government official in charge of a specific department or area of public administration.
Meaning.Example: The minister announced new policies to improve healthcare access.

Situation.Vi: Cảnh sát giao thông đưa bộ trưởng đến trụ sở chính phủ để tham dự hội nghị.
Situation.En: The prime minister meets with the minister of education to discuss school reforms.

Meaning.En: A Protestant clergy member who leads a congregation and performs religious duties.
Meaning.Example: The minister delivered a powerful sermon on compassion and forgiveness.

Situation.Vi: Người dân trong làng thường đến nhà thờ nghe mục sư giảng đạo vào Chủ nhật.
Situation.En: The minister officiated the wedding ceremony in a small乡村 church.

Meaning.Vi: Phục vụ (với tư cách mục sư)
Meaning.En: To serve as a minister, especially in a religious capacity.
Meaning.Example: He has been ministering to the community for over twenty years.

Situation.Vi: Cô ấy đã dành cả đời để phục vụ cộng đồng với vai trò mục sư.
Situation.En: The priest and the minister worked together to organize the charity event.
